zh.Aldford, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas De Ardene於1358年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親John de Arderne60歲，母親Ellen Wasteneys32歲。他於1404年與Elizabeth Pickering在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1405年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Aldford, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas De Ardene于1358年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲John de Arderne60岁，母亲Ellen Wasteneys32岁。他于1404年与Elizabeth Pickering在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1405年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Ardene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas De Ardene was born in 1358, in Somerset, England, his father, John de Arderne, was 60 and his mother, Ellen Wasteneys, was 32. He married Elizabeth Pickering in 1404, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 1405, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas De Ardene est né en 1358, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John de Arderne, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Ellen Wasteneys, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Pickering en 1404, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 1405, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas De Ardene 1358 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Arderne 60 und seine Mutter Ellen Wasteneys 32. Er hat 1404 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Pickering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb nach 1405 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Ardene è nato il nel 1358 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, John de Arderne, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Wasteneys, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Pickering nel 1404, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1405, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas De Ardeneが1358年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父John de Arderneは60歳，母Ellen Wasteneysは32歳であった。1404年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでElizabeth Pickeringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1405年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas De Ardene(이)가 1358년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Arderne(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Wasteneys(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Elizabeth Pickering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1405년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Ardene nasceu em 1358, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Arderne, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Wasteneys, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Pickering em 1404, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 1405, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas De Ardene родился в 1358 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Arderne было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Wasteneys, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Pickering в 1404 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1405 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas De Ardene nació en 1358, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Arderne, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Ellen Wasteneys, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Pickering en 1404, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió después de 1405, en su pueblo.
